title: Meta partners with ElevenLabs to power AI audio across Instagram, Horizon - The Economic Times
text:
Synopsis
ElevenLabs said the collaboration will enable Meta to dub Reels in local languages, generate music, and create character voices in Horizon. The company added that its voice library now includes more than 11,000 voices across over 70 languages.
Agencies
Mark Zuckerberg, CEO, Meta
ElevenLabs
has announced a partnership with
Meta
to provide AI-powered audio services across several Meta platforms, including
Instagram
and Horizon.

ElevenLabs, a fast-growing startup known for its advanced

and
multilingual dubbing tools
â confirmed the development on X.
The company said the collaboration will enable Meta to dub Reels in local languages, generate music, and create character voices in Horizon.
Horizon, Metaâs suite of immersive social and creator experiences built for VR and mixed-reality devices, relies heavily on user-generated content. The integration of ElevenLabsâ technology is expected to make it easier for creators to produce localised audio, build characters, and develop more engaging interactive worlds.
The company added that its voice library now includes more than 11,000 voices across over 70 languages.
